text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way home after going out with Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to keep you out so late. I just really wanted
to go to that motorcycle shop.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The motorcycles there are so cool... And they
each have their own unique appeal!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yep! It all depends on the make, the color, and a
bunch of other stuff...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's like... Hmmm, I dunno how to describe it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You look at 'em and you just think, "Damn!" But
anyways, it's an awesome feeling.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Augh! Why can't I communicate my idea of cool
to you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll understand better if I try out some of
the "cool" stuff myself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ah! Pretty smart! Let's do that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And if it gives me a clearer grasp on the different
points of cool, I might even be able to master
coolness!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right then. Let's start with something easy...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How about a cool way to order at a cafe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to drop by a cafe that Vodka goes to
regularly.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: By the way, tell me how you usually order.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's good. Makes ya sound like a regular!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: All right, lemme do the orderin'. Here goes...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'll have the usual!

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk A
text_block_list.text: The... usual?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yep. The usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What comes out is a parfait with tons of whipped
cream.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: A-a-are you kidding?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You know there's no way somethin' this childish is
my usual!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Seriously! I've never had a Strawberry Fluffy
Mousse Parfait with Whipped Cream before in my
life!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's send it back then...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...W-wait a sec! I didn't say I wouldn't eat it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a big fan of parfaits, but keepin' quiet and
eating what you're given is part of bein' cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, here goes nothing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, it looks so good... Ah, scratch that—I
didn't say anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon saying this, Vodka digs straight into the
parfait.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Is that cool? You're just orderin' a regular coffee.
choice_data_list: Drinking it black is the cool part.
Drinking it black is the cool part.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Interesting. So that's how adults show their
coolness.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...All right. Let's order.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put the black coffee to my lips and let the rich
scent fill my senses. It's delicious.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa. Looks like you're enjoying it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not bad, but I still can't say you're cool yet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Oh, r-right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A black coffee soon appears in front of Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: N-no, nothing. The coffee looks so good.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka takes the cup in her hands, puts on a
brave face, and gulps it down.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
U-urgh... That's...bitter... But the bitterness... is so
good!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If ya put milk or sugar in it, it'd just overpower
the coffee beans!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Coffee totally needs to be black!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pretend not to see the tears in Vodka's eyes
after she finishes the cup.
